patch_description: Swaps the ring entanglement axis and the hub entanglement axis to explore a different expressive motif without changing the total parameter count. Specifically, the ring now uses CRY gates with a shared parameter cry_ring around the outer ring, and the hub gates use CRX gates with a shared parameter crx_hub_edge from the center to edge qubits. This axis swap can improve generalization and validation/test performance while keeping the same inputs/outputs and block depth.
